task_completion.description: Open GCompris and navigate to the Puzzle category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application is open and the Puzzle category is selected (look for the icon of a panda holding jigsaw pieces).
The Crane activity interface is visible, showing a blue frame for manipulation, a model frame for reference, and directional arrow buttons.

task_completion.description: Complete Level 1 of the Crane activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items in the blue frame are moved to exactly match the pattern in the model frame for Level 1, or there is a visual indicator (like a success animation or the level indicator changing to 2) showing Level 1 was successfully completed.

task_completion.description: Complete Level 2 of the Crane activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items in the blue frame are moved to exactly match the pattern in the model frame for Level 2, or a success indicator for Level 2 is shown.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed Level 2 state to /home/ga/crane_completion.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, gnome-screenshot, or import) or a GUI screenshot tool is visible saving the image to the exact path '/home/ga/crane_completion.png', or a file manager shows the newly created file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GCompris GUI to play the game rather than faking the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots should show the crane moving items step-by-step using the directional arrows, rather than jumping instantly from the start state to the completed state.

integrity.description: The screenshot was genuinely captured from the active session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a local screenshot utility or terminal command to capture the screen. There should be no evidence of downloading an image via a web browser, wget, or curl.

integrity.description: The completion state is genuine and not a mock-up or static image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris window matches the system's window manager style and shows consistent UI elements. The final image should not be displayed inside an image viewer or web browser to fake the application state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Crane is an activity in GCompris under the Puzzle category (represented by a panda holding jigsaw pieces, not a yellow puzzle piece). The objective is to use directional arrow buttons (Up/Down/Left/Right) to move items in a blue frame so they match their position in the model frame. The expected screenshot path is /home/ga/crane_completion.png.
